ancestryParagon.name: Ancestry Paragon
ancestryParagon.hint: Adds an additional ancestry feat at first level and every odd level where one isn't already given.
ancestryParagon.label: Ancestry Paragon Feats

skillParagon.name: Skill Paragon
skillParagon.hint: Adds an additional Skill Feat slot for a special feat that grants additional feats based on what skill the feat is for.
skillParagon.label: Skill Paragon Feats

magaambyaBenefits.name: Magaambya Branch Benefits
magaambyaBenefits.hint: Adds an additional feat slot for each level for Magaambyan Branch Benefit Feats.
